gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/346)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ الرَّجُلُ يَقُولُ عَلَيَّ نَذْرٌ وَ لَا يُسَمِّي شَيْئاً قَالَ كَفٌّ مِنْ بُرٍّ غُلِّظَ عَلَيْهِ أَوْ شُدِّدَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Al Hassan Bin Al Husayn Al Lului, raising it,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man is saying, ‘Upon me is a vow’, and he does not name anything’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘A palm full of wheat, whether it is hard upon him or difficult’.
en.sarwar: 14. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn al-Husayn al-Lu’lu’iy in a marfu‘ manner who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who says, ‘There is a vow and commitment on me’, but does not specify. He (the Imam) said, ‘He owes one handful of wheat, regardless, he has taken it seriously or with great emphasis.’”
